string.text: the
we
loners
army soldiers
bandits
Clear Sky stalkers
Duty soldiers
Ecologists
Freedom fighters
mercenaries
Monolith fighters
mutants
zombified stalkers
Sin cultists
UNISG operatives
renegades
Sorry, I don't know much about what's going on out there.
Can you share some intel about the current situation around these parts?
Can't help you with that, sorry.
Ask someone else, I've got enough to worry about.
I'm running a business here, not an information service.
Get lost before I change my mind about letting you walk away.
That's classified. Move along.
I don't share operational intel with outsiders. Move on.
Not really my problem what you know or don't know.
We don't share field data with people we don't know. Sorry.
I'm in the middle of something. Please don't disturb me.
Information costs more than you can afford. Walk away.
You're lucky I'm even talking to you. Don't push it.
The Zone's secrets are not yours to know. Leave.
Operational security. I'm sure you understand.
I have some intel, but it'll cost ya.
Alright, here's the money.
Nevermind
and
the
%s are controlling %s.
%s have taken over %s.
%s are holding %s.
%s are occupying %s.
%s are in control of %s.
%s are dug in at %s.
%s are encamped at %s.
%s have established themselves at %s.
%s have set up at %s.
%s are running %s.
%s claimed %s last I heard.
%s have moved into %s.
%s have been sitting on %s for a while now.
%s took %s and haven't left.
%s are settled at %s, from what I know.
There is fighting over %s.
%s is contested, last I heard.
Someone mentioned a fight breaking out over %s.
%s is a warzone right now apparently.
Word is there's been some shooting over at %s.
There's a firefight going on at %s.
There's some action at %s from what I heard.
Something's going on at %s, doesn't sound good.
There's been some noise around %s, probably a fight.
There's a fight at %s last I heard.
%s are all contested right now.
%s are all seeing fighting, last I heard.
There's been fighting over %s recently.
Word is %s are all warzones right now.
%s have all seen some shooting lately.
There are firefights going on at %s apparently.
There's action at %s from what I heard.
Something's going on at %s, doesn't sound peaceful.
There's been noise around %s, probably fights breaking out.
There are fights reported at %s last I heard.
%s looked empty last I heard.
%s seemed quiet, probably no one there.
%s was deserted when someone passed through recently.
Haven't heard of anyone holding %s lately.
%s was quiet last time it came up.
%s was empty last time I checked.
%s was quiet, but don't take my word for it, it's been a while.
%s was dead silent when I passed through, probably still is.
%s was clear last time I was there, but that was a while ago.
%s was empty, though that could've changed.
%s was rather quiet last I heard.
%s was cleared out by some stalkers a while back.
%s was silent last time it came up.
%s was quiet, probably still clear.
%s was all empty, but that was some time ago.
%s all looked empty last I heard.
%s seemed quiet, probably no one around.
%s were all deserted last time someone mentioned them.
Haven't heard of anyone holding %s lately.
%s were all quiet last time it came up.
%s were all empty last time someone checked.
%s were quiet, but that was some time ago.
%s were all clear last I heard, but things change.
%s were all empty, but don't quote me on that.
%s were peaceful when someone passed through recently.
%s were secured by some stalkers a while back.
%s were all silent last time it came up.
%s were safe last I heard about them.
%s were cleared out some time ago, probably still empty.
%s were all clear, or at least that's what everyone's saying.
%s have been spotted around %s.
Someone reported seeing %s moving around %s.
There were %s seen around %s not long ago.
Word is %s are moving through %s.
%s were reported in the area of %s.
There might be %s moving around %s.
I think there is some movement from %s around %s.
My buddy mentioned seeing %s around %s.
Heard there is some %s activity around %s.
Someone told me there is some movement from %s around %s.
They said there are %s around %s.
I would be careful around %s, apparently there are %s there.
%s have been reported moving through %s recently.
Somebody mentioned %s were seen around %s.
There is some %s action going on around %s from what I heard.
Some of our people were seen around %s.
Our guys have been moving through %s.
Heard some of ours were spotted around %s.
Word is some of our people are around %s.
There might be some of ours moving around %s.
Mutant activity has been reported around %s.
Someone spotted mutants around %s.
There have been mutant sightings near %s.
Watch out for mutants around %s, apparently.
Mutants were reported moving through %s recently.
There are some mutants moving around %s.
Someone mentioned mutants moving around %s.
Locals told me there are mutants around %s.
There might be mutants around %s, from what I heard.
One guy told me there are mutants around %s.
Someone mentioned seeing mutants around %s some time ago.
Could be mutants in the area around %s, be careful.
